title: User Detail
description: Detail view for a single user within a tenant. Displays platform identity and VistA File 200 attributes (keys, menu options, person class). VistA attributes are read-only. Role/key assignment posture requires VistA RPC research for programmatic key assignment.

dataSources.description: Platform identity — name, username, title, assigned roles, lifecycle status.
VistA user record detail — DUZ, keys, menu options, person class. Read-only mirror.
